assay_id: Unique identifier for each assay test.
assay_test_type: Type of assay test conducted (e.g., in vivo).
doc_id: Document identifier associated with the assay.
curated_by: Entity responsible for curating the data (e.g., Autocuration).
assay_tax_id: Taxonomic identifier for the organism used in the assay.
assay_strain: Strain of the organism used in the assay.
src_id: Source identifier for the assay data.
description: Detailed description of the assay and its purpose.
cell_id: Identifier for the cell type used in the assay.
chembl_id: Unique identifier for chemical compounds in ChEMBL database.
assay_subcellular_fraction: Subcellular location or fraction where the assay was conducted.
assay_organism: Species in which the assay was performed.
assay_cell_type: Type of cell used in the assay.
variant_id: Identifier for genetic variants, if applicable (no samples provided).
assay_type: Type of assay conducted (B for binding, F for functional).
assay_category: Category of the assay (no samples provided).
assay_tissue: Tissue in which the assay was performed.
